name: Portfolio Review
description_en: Portfolio-level review: position sizing, concentration, correlation, thesis drift, and action plan for a value-investing portfolio.
description_zh: 组合层面审视：仓位、集中度、相关性、论文漂移与行动计划，面向价值投资组合。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It moves from single-stock research to portfolio management, reviewing each holding against its original thesis and recommending add/trim/exit actions.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。从个股研究延伸到组合管理，对照原始论文审视每个持仓，并建议加仓/减仓/卖出。
sec_note_en: Reads local portfolio files and performs web searches for current prices. No external accounts required for core analysis.
sec_note_zh: 会读取本地组合文件，并执行网络搜索获取当前价格。核心分析无需外部账号。
